== Notes for [[Item:Q87294|Q87294]] ==

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Emesan_dynasty

The father of Sampsiceramus I, Aziz also known as Azizus the Arab[15] and Azizus the Phylarch of the Arabs[15] was an ally to the last Seleucid Greek Monarchs of Syria. Aziz is associated with the rule of the Seleucid Kings Philip I Philadelphus and his brother Demetrius III Eucaerus.[15] Aziz may have assisted Philip I some years before about 87 BC, in the defeat of Demetrius III who ended his days in Parthian exile.[15] Aziz assisted in putting the last Seleucid King, Philip II Philoromaeus, the son of Philip I on the throne, by arranging to meet him and putting the Diadem on his head.[15] However Philip II saw that Aziz befriended him in order to murder him to gain a portion of a divided Syrian Kingdom, and fled to Antioch.[15]

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
66F2940B27E231EFBBE49822EF79916CDE13
geni:6000000041116984907

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
